ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "nuts_code" TEXT /* NUTS code for the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "death_rate_female" REAL /* Death rate for females */,
  "death_rate_male" REAL /* Death rate for males */,
  "death_rate_total" REAL /* Total death rate */,
  "infant_mortality_rate_female" REAL /* Infant mortality rate for females */,
  "infant_mortality_rate_male" REAL /* Infant mortality rate for males */,
  "infant_mortality_rate_total" REAL /* Total infant mortality rate */,
  "life_expectancy_female" REAL /* Life expectancy for females */,
  "life_expectancy_male" REAL /* Life expectancy for males */,
  "life_expectancy_total" REAL /* Total life expectancy */,
  "age_adjusted_death_rate_female" REAL /* Age-adjusted death rate for females */,
  "age_adjusted_death_rate_male" REAL /* Age-adjusted death rate for males */,
  "age_adjusted_death_rate_total" REAL /* Total age-adjusted death rate */,
  "child_mortality_rate_female" REAL /* Child mortality rate for females */,
  "child_mortality_rate_male" REAL /* Child mortality rate for males */,
  "child_mortality_rate_total" REAL /* Total child mortality rate */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Primary cause of death */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Smoking rate in the region */,
  "alcohol_consumption" REAL /* Average alcohol consumption in the region */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the health statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, healthcare provider) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data or reports accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON or text data containing the report's content */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last modified */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
